transcript:
CALLER: Hello, Sunrise Clinic? Mera beta hai, uske liye pediatrician appointment book karni hai.
AGENT: Haan ji, zaroor. Bachche ka naam aur umar bata sakte hain aap?
CALLER: Arjun Mehta. Abhi 4 saal ka hai. Usse fever aa raha hai last 2 days se.
AGENT: Samajh gaya. Aapka contact number?
CALLER: 9890123456.
AGENT: Dhanyawaad. Dr. Anita Saraf humari pediatrician hain. Aaj evening 5:30 PM ka slot available hai. Chalega?
CALLER: Haan haan, aaj hi theek hai. Confirm kar dijiye.
AGENT: Bilkul. Arjun Mehta ke liye aaj 5:30 PM Dr. Anita Saraf ke saath book ho gaya. SMS aayega. Baaki kuch?
CALLER: Nahi, shukriya.
